questions.text: In the NEO system, Material Master data will need to be updated manually for each instance of substitution.
In the NEO system, once a Supersession is activated, the system will prioritize the consumption/selling of the newer product in the substitution chain.
NEO utilizes separate, yet linked, objects in S/4: MM Substitution/Supersession (for Procurement) and SD Substitution (for Sales).
The "Mix Allowed in PO BOM" flag can be manually changed by planners on a case-by-case basis, even after the Supersession is created.
The current substitution management processes (prior to NEO) are fully integrated between Sales and Planning departments.
